requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — ZABS Conformity and Zambia Project Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——ZABS合格评定及赞比亚项目规格
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——ZABS合格評定及尚比亞項目規格

summary.en: IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) are the internationally recognised safety standards for PV inverters. In Zambia, ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) ZS standards adopt IEC baselines, and IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance is expected for ZABS conformity assessment of imported PV inverters where these standards fall within ZABS's regulated product scope. ERB licensing technical conditions for grid-tied solar reference IEC standards for inverter safety. Utility-scale and C&I solar project procurement specifications — including GET FiT Zambia and Scaling Solar programme projects — require IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories. Zambia's expanding mining-sector captive solar plants also specify IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance as a project procurement requirement. Third-party type-test evidence is the expected standard for project finance, EPC procurement, and insurance underwriting for utility and C&I solar in Zambia.
summary.zh: IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）是光伏逆变器的国际公认安全标准。在赞比亚，ZABS（赞比亚标准局）ZS标准采纳IEC基准，IEC 62109-1/-2合规是进口光伏逆变器ZABS合格评定的预期要求（若相关标准属于ZABS受监管产品范围）。并网太阳能ERB许可技术条件引用IEC标准作为逆变器安全要求。大型和工商业太阳能项目采购规格（包括GET FiT赞比亚和Scaling Solar计划项目）要求提供来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。赞比亚不断扩展的矿业自用太阳能电站也将IEC 62109-1/-2合规作为项目采购要求。对于赞比亚大型和工商业太阳能项目，项目融资、EPC采购和保险承保均以第三方型式试验证据为预期标准。
summary.zht: IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）是光伏逆變器的國際公認安全標準。在尚比亞，ZABS（尚比亞標準局）ZS標準採納IEC基準，IEC 62109-1/-2合規是進口光伏逆變器ZABS合格評定的預期要求（若相關標準屬於ZABS受監管產品範圍）。併網太陽能ERB許可技術條件引用IEC標準作為逆變器安全要求。大型和工商業太陽能項目採購規格（包括GET FiT尚比亞和Scaling Solar計畫項目）要求提供來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。尚比亞不斷擴展的礦業自用太陽能電站也將IEC 62109-1/-2合規作為項目採購要求。對於尚比亞大型和工商業太陽能項目，項目融資、EPC採購和保險承保均以第三方型式試驗證據為預期標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted in ZABS ZS framework; referenced in ERB and project specifications)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (implicitly applicable as parent standard)
ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) — ZS conformity assessment for regulated imported electrical products
ERB (Energy Regulation Board) — technical conditions for ERB-licensed grid-tied solar generation
GET FiT Zambia programme — IEC-referenced equipment specifications
Scaling Solar programme (IFC / World Bank) — IEC-referenced procurement specifications

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by ZABS, ERB, or Zambia project owners as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. Chinese CQC/CGC certificates based on GB/T 37408 do not substitute IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for ZABS conformity assessment or project-level specifications in Zambia.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408由中国CNAS认可实验室进行评估。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被ZABS、ERB或赞比亚项目业主接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。基于GB/T 37408的中国CQC/CGC证书不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告用于赞比亚的ZABS合格评定或项目级规格。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408由中國CNAS認可實驗室進行評估。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被ZABS、ERB或尚比亞項目業主接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。基於GB/T 37408的中國CQC/CGC證書不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告用於尚比亞的ZABS合格評定或項目級規格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy ZABS conformity assessment or Zambia project-level IEC 62109-2 type-test requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to Zambia. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for ZABS conformity assessment, ERB technical review, or GET FiT / Scaling Solar project procurement. Verify current ZABS product scope and conformity requirements for PV inverters directly at zabs.org.zm before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足赞比亚ZABS合格评定或项目级IEC 62109-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至赞比亚的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交ZABS合格评定、ERB技术审查或GET FiT / Scaling Solar项目采购所需设备文件前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。出货前请直接在zabs.org.zm核实光伏逆变器的现行ZABS产品范围和合格评定要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足尚比亞ZABS合格評定或項目級IEC 62109-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至尚比亞的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交ZABS合格評定、ERB技術審查或GET FiT / Scaling Solar項目採購所需設備文件前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。出貨前請直接在zabs.org.zm核實光伏逆變器的現行ZABS產品範圍和合格評定要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice: ZABS conformity assessment requires IEC-based evidence for regulated imported products; ERB-licensed projects and GET FiT / Scaling Solar / mining C&I project specifications require IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence as a non-negotiable procurement gate
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy ZABS conformity assessment or Zambia project-level IEC 62109-2 requirements. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for ZABS, ERB, or project procurement review. Verify current ZABS product scope and conformity assessment process for PV inverters directly at zabs.org.zm, and ERB technical conditions at erb.org.zm, before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足ZABS合格评定或赞比亚项目级IEC 62109-2要求。请在提交ZABS、ERB或项目采购审查所需设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接在zabs.org.zm核实光伏逆变器的现行ZABS产品范围和合格评定程序，在erb.org.zm核实ERB技术条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足ZABS合格評定或尚比亞項目級IEC 62109-2要求。請在提交ZABS、ERB或項目採購審查所需設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接在zabs.org.zm核實光伏逆變器的現行ZABS產品範圍和合格評定程序，在erb.org.zm核實ERB技術條件。
